# Blink

> Blink is an AI planning partner for people who struggle with focus and
> follow-through — it doesn't just make the task list, it checks in,
> re-nudges, and re-schedules until the task is actually done. iOS app,
> built by a solo founder who built it for himself first.

Blink is not a medical device, therapist, or substitute for professional
care.

## Key facts

- Platform: iPhone (iOS). Distributed on the Apple App Store.
- What it does: conversational AI coach, AI task breakdown (vague task →
  concrete steps), calendar-first scheduling, adaptive reminders,
  persistent memory of your context, and a rewards system.
- What makes it different: follow-through. Most planning apps stop after
  the list exists; Blink keeps checking in on day 30 the same way it did
  on day 1.
- Cancellation: cancel anytime in one tap inside the app — no retention
  screens, no phone calls, no dark patterns. Subscriptions are billed and
  managed by Apple, so cancellation also works from iPhone Settings.
- Free tier: a genuinely usable free plan (daily-capped AI chat and task
  breakdown, unlimited manual tasks and lists).

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://coachblink.com/pricing.md): Blink Pro is $9.99/month
  or $59.99/year (about $5.00/month, 50% off monthly). 7-day free trial.
  Free tier available forever.

## Learn more

- [Home](https://coachblink.com/): product overview and App Store link
- [Blog](https://coachblink.com/blog/): essays on focus, follow-through,
  and why easy things feel impossible
- [Cancel anytime, actually](https://coachblink.com/blog/cancel-anytime-actually.html):
  our no-dark-patterns billing promise, in writing
